message:
fix(vdbe): roll back earlier index entries on IGNORE unique conflict

When INSERT OR IGNORE hit a unique constraint violation on the Nth
index, the rollback only deleted the main table row but left index
entries from indexes 1..N-1 in place. These phantom entries caused
subsequent inserts with the same values to falsely conflict.

Added pending_idx_entries tracking: on successful IdxInsert, record
(cursor_id, key_bytes). On IGNORE rollback, seek-and-delete each
prior entry before removing the main table row.

Also adds 8 more conformance oracle tests covering: NULLS FIRST/LAST,
compound SELECT ordering, self-joins, dynamic typing, UPDATE with
subquery SET, CROSS JOIN, CASE+aggregate mixtures, multi-UNIQUE
conflict handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
